missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: The Nikkei Choral Ensemble (also known as NiCE) is the University of California, Berkeley's premiere Japanese and English acapella group. This Bay Area-based ensemble has been singing songs from anime, games, and pop culture for over 15 years, and will be making their Anime Expo debut this year! All of the music that NiCE performs is chosen and arranged by members of the group. They hope that you enjoy their favorite songs as much as they do!

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Charity Auction at Anime Expo 2026

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Anime Expo 2026 Feedback Panel
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: Anime Expo has come and gone once again. Let us know what you loved, what you want to see more of, and what we can improve on for next year. missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Faith in The Glitch
missingWorkTitleCandidates.description: Faith in the Glitch has been a resident DJ for the nationally touring Future Funk party Yoi Toki, sharing stages with artists like Yung Bae, Saint Pepsi, and Macross 82-99. A lifelong anime nerd with a deep love for the culture, FitG blends anime edits, nostalgic mashups, fresh scratching, and high-energy party vibes into unforgettable sets. With decades behind the decks, Faith in the Glitch has rocked crowds at Otakon, Katsucon, Sakura-Con, and more—bringing convention energy and dance floor chaos wherever they go. Now, FitG is ready to bring that same energy west to Anime Expo in Los Angeles.

missingWorkTitleCandidates.title: Make Your Debut as an Author in Japan!
